name: Kaggle Nemotron

verify.summary: Run the Python test suite for the Nemotron lab.

smoke.summary: Check the local Nemotron MLX CLI entrypoint.

secretsPolicy.summary: Competition tokens and dataset credentials stay in ignored local env or Kaggle config.

notes: Prefer local M4 Max/MPS and shared MLX workbench before billable GPU pods.
Registry status only declares tests; it does not run uv or download datasets.
